name: How much does voice search optimization cost, and is it worth it?
description: It can be inexpensive if you handle the basics yourself. The value comes from more calls, directions, and bookings from people already looking nearby.

mainEntity.name: How much does voice search optimization cost, and is it worth it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary widely depending on whether you do it yourself or hire help, but the essentials are usually low-cost: listings, content updates, reviews, and schema markup. The biggest value comes from improving visibility for high-intent local searches that can lead to calls, directions, and bookings.
acceptedAnswer.description: It can be inexpensive if you handle the basics yourself. The value comes from more calls, directions, and bookings from people already looking nearby.
